title: GitHub - llmrelay/relay: Self-hosted LLM gateway + model router. One static binary, OpenAI & Anthropic dialects in, any provider out, zero telemetry.
excerpt: Self-hosted LLM gateway + model router. One static binary, OpenAI & Anthropic dialects in, any provider out, zero telemetry. - llmrelay/relay
content_html:
Self-hosted LLM gateway + model router. One static Go binary that speaks both the OpenAI and Anthropic API dialects inbound, routes across any provider outbound (bring your own keys), with routing policies from static aliases to a learned smart tier — gated by an eval harness that ships in the box. Zero telemetry — not even opt-in pings. Apache-2.0.

any OpenAI SDK ─┐                                  ┌─ OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini
Claude Code ────┤→  relay (one binary, :4000)  →  ├─ Groq / DeepSeek / Mistral / xAI / …
plain curl ─────┘   route · failover · log · cache └─ your local Ollama

60-second quickstart

# 1. install (or download a release binary; a tested Dockerfile is included to build yourself)
brew install llmrelay/tap/relay

# 2. keys you already have, zero config
export GEMINI_API_KEY=...        # and/or OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, GROQ_API_KEY, ...
relay serve

# 3. point anything at it
curl http://localhost:4000/v1/chat/completions -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"model":"gemini/gemini-3.1-flash-lite","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hello"}]}'
export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4000   # Claude Code now runs through relay

relay init scaffolds a full relay.yaml — including where to get every provider's key. See examples/ for Claude Code, Cursor, SDK snippets, and the sensitive-local / bulk-cheap alias recipe.

Why relay (and honest alternatives)

relay LiteLLM OpenRouter RouteLLM
What it is self-hosted gateway + router Python proxy/SDK gateway hosted aggregator API research routing framework
Deploy one static binary / distroless image Python service + deps nothing (their cloud) Python library
Inbound dialects OpenAI and Anthropic, full cross-translation OpenAI (+ passthroughs) OpenAI-compatible n/a
Learned routing tiered, local, trained on your logs, eval-gated manual routing strategies their routing the prior art¹
Eval harness in the box yes (relay eval, committed sets, live-judge) no no offline research harness
Your prompts transit a third party never (self-hosted; remote-embedder routing requires explicit opt-in) self-hosted yes — that's the product n/a
Telemetry none, ever none per their docs hosted service n/a
Ecosystem breadth 4 native + 12 presets, adapter guide broadest provider matrix, teams/budgets/virtual keys very broad n/a
License / runtime Apache-2.0, Go mixed (OSS + enterprise), Python proprietary service Apache-2.0, Python

¹ relay's tier-2 KNN is the same family as RouteLLM (Ong et al.), run locally over your own traffic; graph routers (GraphRouter, ICLR 2025) are roadmap. LiteLLM and OpenRouter are good products with different trade-offs — pick the row that matters to you.

API compatibility

Inbound Status
OpenAI Chat Completions (/v1/chat/completions) full, incl. streaming, tools, vision
OpenAI Responses API (/v1/responses) not yet — tracked v1.1 fast-follow
Anthropic Messages (/v1/messages, count_tokens) full, incl. streaming, tools
Embeddings (/v1/embeddings) OpenAI dialect; providers without an embeddings API answer an honest 404
/v1/models, /metrics (Prometheus), /dashboard, /v1/feedback yes

Performance

Gateway overhead measured against a loopback mock upstream (go test -run TestOverheadBudget ./internal/server/ — the budget is a hard CI gate, methodology in DESIGN.md §11; Windows 11 / Go 1.25, 2026-07-18):

Metric Budget (CI-gated) Measured
Non-streaming p50 overhead < 5 ms ~0.18 ms
Added time-to-first-token p50 (streaming) < 2 ms ~0.63 ms

Provider latency dominates end-to-end time; relay's job is to stay invisible.

Routing

Static routes and aliases with four policies (fallback / cheapest / fastest / weighted), plus reliability underneath every chain: retries with jittered backoff, API-key pools with rate-limit cooldowns, circuit breakers, and pre-first-token streaming failover.

Smart routing — off by default, and that's the feature

relay ships a difficulty-based smart router (easy traffic → your cheap chain, hard → your frontier chain) with an eval harness — and the harness's own verdict is that you should beat our baseline on your traffic before trusting it, so smart routing is off by default:

relay eval                          # dry-run: the committed sets, your candidates
relay eval --live-judge --dry-run   # real completions, judge-scored; prints spend first

What our harness measured on the held-out set v2, live-judged — real completions from each routed model, quality scored by claude-opus-4-8 (2026-07-20; 49 prompts, valid N = 49 for every policy; completions capped at 700 output tokens; mid band is claude-sonnet-5 because Gemini's free tier caps gemini-3.5-flash at 20 requests/day; 6 of 147 judge replies buried the verdict number in commentary and were re-parsed deterministically from the preserved raw replies rather than scored 0 — the corrections log inside the verdict JSON records each one):

Policy Cost vs always-frontier Judged quality delta Verdict at −0.0200 tolerance (inclusive)
static-cheap / cheapest −98% +0.0163 passes
static-mid −69% +0.0041 passes
tier 1 (lexical) −50% −0.0204 fail — strictly below the bound
tier 2 (embedding KNN, cold-start) −17% −0.0061 passes within tolerance; opt-in for v0.1.0
static-frontier (baseline) — — —

Values are shown rounded. Gate decisions use the unrounded values from the committed verdict asset (a delta of exactly −0.0200 would pass — the rule is inclusive; tier 1's unrounded delta is −0.020408…, exactly −1/49, strictly below it). A CI test asserts this table matches the asset at full precision.

On this 49-prompt, 700-output-token, single-judge evaluation, the static-cheap baseline received a higher judged score than the configured frontier baseline. That result is specific to the tested models, prompts, token cap, and judge — it is not a general model-quality claim. What it does establish is the bar relay holds itself to: routing cleverness must earn its keep against strong dumb baselines, measured on your traffic. Tier 1 failed that bar on held-out data; tier 2 passed within tolerance but stays opt-in for v0.1.0; no smart tier is on by default.

(History: on the v1 set tier 1 had "passed" synthetic at −0.017 — in-sample flattery, since its weights were calibrated on v1. On v2 synthetic labels it failed at −0.071. v1 is the calibration set; v2 live-judged is the standing verdict. Full tables: assets/eval/.)

Enabling it is one config block — with an explicit tier, because nothing routes your traffic by silent default:

providers:
  gemini:
    api_key: ["${GEMINI_API_KEY}"]
  anthropic:
    api_key: ["${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY}"]
  ollama:
    type: ollama

routing:
  default: smart
  smart:
    easy: gemini/gemini-3.1-flash-lite
    hard: anthropic/claude-sonnet-5
    embeddings: ollama/nomic-embed-text   # selects the knn tier (documented path)
    # tier: lexical                       # experimental: failed the held-out gate

Tier 2 (KNN) gets better on YOUR traffic via relay train — implicit signals, optional replay+judge (always estimates spend and asks first), and POST /v1/feedback scores grow its reference set; then measure your own crossover with relay eval --refs ~/.relay/smart_refs.json. Every smart decision logs its evidence (knn: 5 neighbors [seed-math-03 d=0.75 sim=0.95; …]) — "the model felt like it" is not an accepted routing reason. A remote embedder requires allow_remote_embeddings: true; routing never silently ships prompts anywhere.

Compare models on your own prompts

relay compare --models gemini/gemini-3.1-flash-lite,anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5,groq/llama-3.3-70b \
  --html compare.html "Explain CRDTs to a backend engineer in five sentences."

One table (and a shareable HTML report): output, cost, latency, and TTFT side by side, through the same adapters that serve your traffic. docs/models-landscape.md is the dated "which model for what" companion.

Observability

Every request logs to local SQLite with privacy tiers (off by default — metadata only; embeddings stores query vectors, never text; full is an explicit choice). /dashboard shows spend by day, latency percentiles, and recent routing decisions with human-readable reasons. /metrics is Prometheus. Models missing from the pricing registry surface as unpriced — never a silent $0.

Security

Loopback by default; a non-loopback bind without inbound API keys refuses to start. No telemetry. See SECURITY.md.

Contributing

CONTRIBUTING.md — the adapter-authoring guide is there; an OpenAI-compatible provider is a one-entry preset. Design changes get argued in DESIGN.md §0 first; it's how the doc stays true.

blocks.html_en: Self-hosted LLM gateway + model router. One static Go binary that speaks both the OpenAI and Anthropic API dialects inbound, routes across any provider outbound (bring your own keys), with routing policies from static aliases to a learned smart tier — gated by an eval harness that ships in the box. Zero telemetry — not even opt-in pings. Apache-2.0.

sentences.zh: 自托管LLM网关+模型路由器。

sentences.en: One static Go binary that speaks both the OpenAI and Anthropic API dialects inbound, routes across any provider outbound (bring your own keys), with routing policies from static aliases to a learned smart tier — gated by an eval harness that ships in the box.
sentences.zh: 一个静态 Go 二进制文件，可以同时使用 OpenAI 和 Anthropic API 方言入站，跨任何提供者出站路由（带上您自己的密钥），并具有从静态别名到学习智能层的路由策略 - 由包装盒中附带的评估工具进行控制。

sentences.en: Zero telemetry — not even opt-in pings.
sentences.zh: 零遥测——甚至没有选择加入 ping。

blocks.html_en: relay init scaffolds a full relay.yaml — including where to get every provider's key. See examples/ for Claude Code, Cursor, SDK snippets, and the sensitive-local / bulk-cheap alias recipe.

sentences.en: relay init scaffolds a full relay.yaml — including where to get every provider's key.
sentences.zh: relay init 构建了完整的relay.yaml — 包括从哪里获取每个提供商的密钥。

sentences.en: See examples/ for Claude Code, Cursor, SDK snippets, and the sensitive-local / bulk-cheap alias recipe.
sentences.zh: 请参阅示例/了解 Claude 代码、光标、SDK 片段以及sensitive-local/bulk-cheap 别名配方。
为什么要中继（以及诚实的替代方案）
一个静态二进制/无发行映像
OpenAI 和 Anthropic，完全交叉翻译

sentences.en: tiered, local, trained on your logs, eval-gated
sentences.zh: 分层、本地、根据日志进行训练、评估门控
是（接力评估、承诺组、现场评审）

sentences.en: Your prompts transit a third party
sentences.zh: 您的提示会传输给第三方

sentences.en: never (self-hosted; remote-embedder routing requires explicit opt-in)
sentences.zh: 从不（自托管；远程嵌入器路由需要显式选择加入）
4 个原生 + 12 个预设、适配器指南
最广泛的提供商矩阵、团队/预算/虚拟密钥

blocks.html_en: ¹ relay's tier-2 KNN is the same family as RouteLLM (Ong et al.), run locally over your own traffic; graph routers (GraphRouter, ICLR 2025) are roadmap. LiteLLM and OpenRouter are good products with different trade-offs — pick the row that matters to you.

sentences.en: ¹ relay's tier-2 KNN is the same family as RouteLLM (Ong et al.), run locally over your own traffic; graph routers (GraphRouter, ICLR 2025) are roadmap.
sentences.zh: 1 中继的第 2 层 KNN 与 RouteLLM（Ong 等人）属于同一系列，在您自己的流量上本地运行；图路由器（GraphRouter、ICLR 2025）是路线图。

sentences.en: LiteLLM and OpenRouter are good products with different trade-offs — pick the row that matters to you.
sentences.zh: LiteLLM 和 OpenRouter 都是很好的产品，具有不同的权衡 - 选择对您来说重要的行。

blocks.html_en: OpenAI dialect; providers without an embeddings API answer an honest 404

sentences.en: OpenAI dialect; providers without an embeddings API answer an honest 404
sentences.zh: OpenAI 方言；没有嵌入 API 的提供商会诚实地回答 404

blocks.html_en: Gateway overhead measured against a loopback mock upstream (go test -run TestOverheadBudget ./internal/server/ — the budget is a hard CI gate, methodology in DESIGN.md §11; Windows 11 / Go 1.25, 2026-07-18):

sentences.zh: 针对环回模拟上游测量的网关开销（go test -run TestOverheadBudget ./internal/server/ — 预算是硬 CI 门，方法见 DESIGN.md §11；Windows 11 / Go 1.25，2026-07-18）：
添加了首次令牌 p50 的时间（流式传输）

blocks.html_en: Provider latency dominates end-to-end time; relay's job is to stay invisible.

sentences.en: Provider latency dominates end-to-end time; relay's job is to stay invisible.
sentences.zh: 提供商延迟主导端到端时间；中继的工作就是保持隐形。

blocks.html_en: Static routes and aliases with four policies (fallback / cheapest / fastest / weighted), plus reliability underneath every chain: retries with jittered backoff, API-key pools with rate-limit cooldowns, circuit breakers, and pre-first-token streaming failover.

sentences.en: Static routes and aliases with four policies (fallback / cheapest / fastest / weighted), plus reliability underneath every chain: retries with jittered backoff, API-key pools with rate-limit cooldowns, circuit breakers, and pre-first-token streaming failover.
sentences.zh: 具有四种策略（回退/最便宜/最快/加权）的静态路由和别名，以及每个链下的可靠性：带抖动回退的重试、具有速率限制冷却的 API 密钥池、断路器和预第一个令牌流式故障转移。

blocks.html_en: Smart routing — off by default, and that's the feature

sentences.en: Smart routing — off by default, and that's the feature
sentences.zh: 智能路由——默认关闭，这就是功能

blocks.html_en: relay ships a difficulty-based smart router (easy traffic → your cheap chain, hard → your frontier chain) with an eval harness — and the harness's own verdict is that you should beat our baseline on your traffic before trusting it, so smart routing is off by default:

sentences.en: relay ships a difficulty-based smart router (easy traffic → your cheap chain, hard → your frontier chain) with an eval harness — and the harness's own verdict is that you should beat our baseline on your traffic before trusting it, so smart routing is off by default:
sentences.zh: Relay 提供了一个基于难度的智能路由器（简单流量→你的廉价链，困难→你的前沿链），并带有一个评估工具——该工具自己的结论是，在信任它之前，你应该在你的流量上超越我们的基线，所以智能路由默认是关闭的：

blocks.html_en: What our harness measured on the held-out set v2, live-judged — real completions from each routed model, quality scored by claude-opus-4-8 (2026-07-20; 49 prompts, valid N = 49 for every policy; completions capped at 700 output tokens; mid band is claude-sonnet-5 because Gemini's free tier caps gemini-3.5-flash at 20 requests/day; 6 of 147 judge replies buried the verdict number in commentary and were re-parsed deterministically from the preserved raw replies rather than scored 0 — the corrections log inside the verdict JSON records each one):

sentences.en: What our harness measured on the held-out set v2, live-judged — real completions from each routed model, quality scored by claude-opus-4-8 (2026-07-20; 49 prompts, valid N = 49 for every policy; completions capped at 700 output tokens; mid band is claude-sonnet-5 because Gemini's free tier caps gemini-3.5-flash at 20 requests/day; 6 of 147 judge replies buried the verdict number in commentary and were re-parsed deterministically from the preserved raw replies rather than scored 0 — the corrections log inside the verdict JSON records each one):
sentences.zh: 我们的工具在保留集 v2 上测量的内容，实时判断 - 每个路由模型的真实完成情况，质量由 claude-opus-4-8 评分（2026-07-20；49 个提示，每个策略有效 N = 49；完成情况上限为 700 个输出令牌；中带是 claude-sonnet-5，因为 Gemini 的免费层将 gemini-3.5-flash 限制为 20请求/天；147 条法官回复中的 6 条将判决编号隐藏在评论中，并根据保留的原始回复进行确定性重新解析，而不是评分为 0 — 判决 JSON 记录中的每一条都记录在其中）：
第 2 层（嵌入 KNN、冷启动）

sentences.en: passes within tolerance; opt-in for v0.1.0
sentences.zh: 在公差范围内通过；选择加入 v0.1.0

A CI test asserts this table matches the asset at full precision.

sentences.zh: CI 测试断言该表与资产完全匹配。

sentences.en: That result is specific to the tested models, prompts, token cap, and judge — it is not a general model-quality claim.
sentences.zh: 该结果特定于测试的模型、提示、代币上限和判断——这不是一般的模型质量声明。

sentences.en: What it does establish is the bar relay holds itself to: routing cleverness must earn its keep against strong dumb baselines, measured on your traffic.
sentences.zh: 它所建立的是酒吧中继坚持自己：路由智能必须能够抵御强大的愚蠢基线，根据您的流量进行测量。

sentences.en: Tier 1 failed that bar on held-out data; tier 2 passed within tolerance but stays opt-in for v0.1.0; no smart tier is on by default.
sentences.zh: 第 1 层在保留数据方面未达到该标准；第 2 层在容差范围内通过，但仍选择加入 v0.1.0；默认情况下没有启用智能层。

blocks.html_en: (History: on the v1 set tier 1 had "passed" synthetic at −0.017 — in-sample flattery, since its weights were calibrated on v1. On v2 synthetic labels it failed at −0.071. v1 is the calibration set; v2 live-judged is the standing verdict. Full tables: assets/eval/.)

sentences.en: (History: on the v1 set tier 1 had "passed" synthetic at −0.017 — in-sample flattery, since its weights were calibrated on v1.
sentences.zh: （历史：在 v1 集上，第 1 层在 -0.017 处“通过”了合成——样本内的恭维，因为它的权重是在 v1 上校准的。

sentences.en: On v2 synthetic labels it failed at −0.071.
sentences.zh: 在 v2 合成标签上，它失败于 -0.071。

sentences.en: v1 is the calibration set; v2 live-judged is the standing verdict.
sentences.zh: v1为校准集； v2 现场判决是长期判决。

blocks.html_en: Enabling it is one config block — with an explicit tier, because nothing routes your traffic by silent default:

sentences.en: Enabling it is one config block — with an explicit tier, because nothing routes your traffic by silent default:
sentences.zh: 启用它是一个配置块 - 具有显式层，因为默认情况下没有任何内容路由您的流量：

blocks.html_en: Tier 2 (KNN) gets better on YOUR traffic via relay train — implicit signals, optional replay+judge (always estimates spend and asks first), and POST /v1/feedback scores grow its reference set; then measure your own crossover with relay eval --refs ~/.relay/smart_refs.json. Every smart decision logs its evidence (knn: 5 neighbors [seed-math-03 d=0.75 sim=0.95; …]) — "the model felt like it" is not an accepted routing reason. A remote embedder requires allow_remote_embeddings: true; routing never silently ships prompts anywhere.

sentences.en: Tier 2 (KNN) gets better on YOUR traffic via relay train — implicit signals, optional replay+judge (always estimates spend and asks first), and POST /v1/feedback scores grow its reference set; then measure your own crossover with relay eval --refs ~/.relay/smart_refs.json.
sentences.zh: 第 2 层 (KNN) 通过中继列车更好地处理您的流量 — 隐式信号、可选的重播+判断（始终估计支出并首先询问）以及 POST /v1/feedback 分数增加其参考集；然后使用relay eval --refs ~/.relay/smart_refs.json 测量你自己的交叉。

sentences.en: Every smart decision logs its evidence (knn: 5 neighbors [seed-math-03 d=0.75 sim=0.95; …]) — "the model felt like it" is not an accepted routing reason.
sentences.zh: 每个明智的决策都会记录其证据（knn：5个邻居[seed-math-03 d = 0.75 sim = 0.95; …]） - “模型感觉像这样”并不是公认的路由原因。

sentences.en: A remote embedder requires allow_remote_embeddings: true; routing never silently ships prompts anywhere.
sentences.zh: 远程嵌入器需要allow_remote_embeddings: true;路由永远不会默默地将提示发送到任何地方。

blocks.html_en: Compare models on your own prompts

sentences.en: Compare models on your own prompts
sentences.zh: 根据您自己的提示比较模型

blocks.html_en: One table (and a shareable HTML report): output, cost, latency, and TTFT side by side, through the same adapters that serve your traffic. docs/models-landscape.md is the dated "which model for what" companion.

sentences.en: One table (and a shareable HTML report): output, cost, latency, and TTFT side by side, through the same adapters that serve your traffic.
sentences.zh: 一张表（以及可共享的 HTML 报告）：通过为您的流量提供服务的相同适配器并排显示输出、成本、延迟和 TTFT。

sentences.en: docs/models-landscape.md is the dated "which model for what" companion.
sentences.zh: docs/models-landscape.md 是过时的“哪个模型用于什么”同伴。

blocks.html_en: Every request logs to local SQLite with privacy tiers (off by default — metadata only; embeddings stores query vectors, never text; full is an explicit choice). /dashboard shows spend by day, latency percentiles, and recent routing decisions with human-readable reasons. /metrics is Prometheus. Models missing from the pricing registry surface as unpriced — never a silent $0.

sentences.en: Every request logs to local SQLite with privacy tiers (off by default — metadata only; embeddings stores query vectors, never text; full is an explicit choice). /dashboard shows spend by day, latency percentiles, and recent routing decisions with human-readable reasons. /metrics is Prometheus.
sentences.zh: 每个请求都会记录到具有隐私层的本地 SQLite（默认情况下关闭 - 仅元数据；嵌入存储查询向量，从不存储文本；完整是一个显式选择）。 /dashboard 显示每天的支出、延迟百分位数以及最近的路由决策以及人类可读的原因。 /metrics 是普罗米修斯。

sentences.en: Models missing from the pricing registry surface as unpriced — never a silent $0.
sentences.zh: 定价登记中缺失的型号表面上是未定价的——从来都不是沉默的 0 美元。

blocks.html_en: Loopback by default; a non-loopback bind without inbound API keys refuses to start. No telemetry. See SECURITY.md.

sentences.en: Loopback by default; a non-loopback bind without inbound API keys refuses to start.
sentences.zh: 默认环回；没有入站 API 密钥的非环回绑定拒绝启动。

blocks.html_en: CONTRIBUTING.md — the adapter-authoring guide is there; an OpenAI-compatible provider is a one-entry preset. Design changes get argued in DESIGN.md §0 first; it's how the doc stays true.

sentences.en: CONTRIBUTING.md — the adapter-authoring guide is there; an OpenAI-compatible provider is a one-entry preset.
sentences.zh: CONTRIBUTING.md — 适配器创作指南就在那里；兼容 OpenAI 的提供程序是一项单项预设。

sentences.en: Design changes get argued in DESIGN.md §0 first; it's how the doc stays true.
sentences.zh: 设计变更首先在 DESIGN.md §0 中争论；这就是文档保持真实的方式。

content_html_zh:
自托管LLM网关+模型路由器。 一个静态 Go 二进制文件，可以同时使用 OpenAI 和 Anthropic API 方言入站，跨任何提供者出站路由（带上您自己的密钥），并具有从静态别名到学习智能层的路由策略 - 由包装盒中附带的评估工具进行控制。 零遥测——甚至没有选择加入 ping。 阿帕奇-2.0。

any OpenAI SDK ─┐                                  ┌─ OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini
Claude Code ────┤→  relay (one binary, :4000)  →  ├─ Groq / DeepSeek / Mistral / xAI / …
plain curl ─────┘   route · failover · log · cache └─ your local Ollama

60 秒快速入门

# 1. install (or download a release binary; a tested Dockerfile is included to build yourself)
brew install llmrelay/tap/relay

# 2. keys you already have, zero config
export GEMINI_API_KEY=...        # and/or OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, GROQ_API_KEY, ...
relay serve

# 3. point anything at it
curl http://localhost:4000/v1/chat/completions -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"model":"gemini/gemini-3.1-flash-lite","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hello"}]}'
export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4000   # Claude Code now runs through relay

relay init 构建了完整的relay.yaml — 包括从哪里获取每个提供商的密钥。 请参阅示例/了解 Claude 代码、光标、SDK 片段以及sensitive-local/bulk-cheap 别名配方。

为什么要中继（以及诚实的替代方案）

relay 莱特法学硕士 开放路由器 路线LLM
它是什么 自托管网关+路由器 Python代理/SDK网关 托管聚合器 API 研究路线框架
部署 一个静态二进制/无发行映像 Python服务+依赖 什么都没有（他们的云） Python库
入境方言 OpenAI 和 Anthropic，完全交叉翻译 OpenAI（+ 直通） 兼容 OpenAI n/a
学习路由 分层、本地、根据日志进行训练、评估门控 手动路由策略 他们的路线 现有技术1
盒子里的评估安全带 是（接力评估、承诺组、现场评审） no no 离线研究工具
您的提示会传输给第三方 从不（自托管；远程嵌入器路由需要显式选择加入） 自托管 是的——这就是产品 n/a
遥测 没有，从来没有 根据他们的文档没有 托管服务 n/a
生态系统广度 4 个原生 + 12 个预设、适配器指南 最广泛的提供商矩阵、团队/预算/虚拟密钥 非常广泛 n/a
许可证/运行时间 Apache-2.0，去 混合（OSS + 企业）、Python 专有服务 Apache-2.0、Python

1 中继的第 2 层 KNN 与 RouteLLM（Ong 等人）属于同一系列，在您自己的流量上本地运行；图路由器（GraphRouter、ICLR 2025）是路线图。 LiteLLM 和 OpenRouter 都是很好的产品，具有不同的权衡 - 选择对您来说重要的行。

API兼容性

入境 地位
OpenAI 聊天完成 (/v1/chat/completions) 完整，包括。 流媒体、工具、愿景
OpenAI 响应 API (/v1/responses) 还没有 — tracked v1.1 fast-follow
人择消息（/v1/messages、count_tokens） 完整，包括。 流媒体、工具
嵌入 (/v1/embeddings) OpenAI 方言；没有嵌入 API 的提供商会诚实地回答 404
/v1/models、/metrics (Prometheus)、/dashboard、/v1/feedback yes

表现

针对环回模拟上游测量的网关开销（go test -run TestOverheadBudget ./internal/server/ — 预算是硬 CI 门，方法见 DESIGN.md §11；Windows 11 / Go 1.25，2026-07-18）：

公制 预算（CI 门控） 测量的
非流式 p50 开销 < 5 ms ~0.18 ms
添加了首次令牌 p50 的时间（流式传输） < 2 ms ~0.63 ms

提供商延迟主导端到端时间；中继的工作就是保持隐形。

路由

具有四种策略（回退/最便宜/最快/加权）的静态路由和别名，以及每个链下的可靠性：带抖动回退的重试、具有速率限制冷却的 API 密钥池、断路器和预第一个令牌流式故障转移。

智能路由——默认关闭，这就是功能

Relay 提供了一个基于难度的智能路由器（简单流量→你的廉价链，困难→你的前沿链），并带有一个评估工具——该工具自己的结论是，在信任它之前，你应该在你的流量上超越我们的基线，所以智能路由默认是关闭的：

relay eval                          # dry-run: the committed sets, your candidates
relay eval --live-judge --dry-run   # real completions, judge-scored; prints spend first

我们的工具在保留集 v2 上测量的内容，实时判断 - 每个路由模型的真实完成情况，质量由 claude-opus-4-8 评分（2026-07-20；49 个提示，每个策略有效 N = 49；完成情况上限为 700 个输出令牌；中带是 claude-sonnet-5，因为 Gemini 的免费层将 gemini-3.5-flash 限制为 20请求/天；147 条法官回复中的 6 条将判决编号隐藏在评论中，并根据保留的原始回复进行确定性重新解析，而不是评分为 0 — 判决 JSON 记录中的每一条都记录在其中）：

政策 成本与永远前沿 判定质量增量 公差为-0.0200（含）的判决
静态便宜/最便宜 −98% +0.0163 通过
静态中 −69% +0.0041 通过
第一级（词汇） −50% −0.0204 失败——严格低于界限
第 2 层（嵌入 KNN、冷启动） −17% −0.0061 在公差范围内通过；选择加入 v0.1.0
静态前沿（基线） — — —

值显示为四舍五入。 门决策使用来自提交的判决资产的未舍入值（恰好为 -0.0200 的增量将通过 - 该规则是包容性的；第 1 层的未舍入增量为 -0.020408…，正好为 -1/49，严格低于它）。 CI 测试断言该表与资产完全匹配。

在这个 49 个提示、700 个输出令牌、单评判评估中，静态廉价基线获得的评分高于配置的前沿基线。 该结果特定于测试的模型、提示、代币上限和判断——这不是一般的模型质量声明。 它所建立的是酒吧中继坚持自己：路由智能必须能够抵御强大的愚蠢基线，根据您的流量进行测量。 第 1 层在保留数据方面未达到该标准；第 2 层在容差范围内通过，但仍选择加入 v0.1.0；默认情况下没有启用智能层。

（历史：在 v1 集上，第 1 层在 -0.017 处“通过”了合成——样本内的恭维，因为它的权重是在 v1 上校准的。 在 v2 合成标签上，它失败于 -0.071。 v1为校准集； v2 现场判决是长期判决。 完整表格：资产/评估/。）

启用它是一个配置块 - 具有显式层，因为默认情况下没有任何内容路由您的流量：

providers:
  gemini:
    api_key: ["${GEMINI_API_KEY}"]
  anthropic:
    api_key: ["${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY}"]
  ollama:
    type: ollama

routing:
  default: smart
  smart:
    easy: gemini/gemini-3.1-flash-lite
    hard: anthropic/claude-sonnet-5
    embeddings: ollama/nomic-embed-text   # selects the knn tier (documented path)
    # tier: lexical                       # experimental: failed the held-out gate

第 2 层 (KNN) 通过中继列车更好地处理您的流量 — 隐式信号、可选的重播+判断（始终估计支出并首先询问）以及 POST /v1/feedback 分数增加其参考集；然后使用relay eval --refs ~/.relay/smart_refs.json 测量你自己的交叉。 每个明智的决策都会记录其证据（knn：5个邻居[seed-math-03 d = 0.75 sim = 0.95; …]） - “模型感觉像这样”并不是公认的路由原因。 远程嵌入器需要allow_remote_embeddings: true;路由永远不会默默地将提示发送到任何地方。

根据您自己的提示比较模型

relay compare --models gemini/gemini-3.1-flash-lite,anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5,groq/llama-3.3-70b \
  --html compare.html "Explain CRDTs to a backend engineer in five sentences."

一张表（以及可共享的 HTML 报告）：通过为您的流量提供服务的相同适配器并排显示输出、成本、延迟和 TTFT。 docs/models-landscape.md 是过时的“哪个模型用于什么”同伴。

可观察性

每个请求都会记录到具有隐私层的本地 SQLite（默认情况下关闭 - 仅元数据；嵌入存储查询向量，从不存储文本；完整是一个显式选择）。 /dashboard 显示每天的支出、延迟百分位数以及最近的路由决策以及人类可读的原因。 /metrics 是普罗米修斯。 定价登记中缺失的型号表面上是未定价的——从来都不是沉默的 0 美元。

安全

默认环回；没有入站 API 密钥的非环回绑定拒绝启动。 没有遥测。 请参阅 SECURITY.md。

贡献

CONTRIBUTING.md — 适配器创作指南就在那里；兼容 OpenAI 的提供程序是一项单项预设。 设计变更首先在 DESIGN.md §0 中争论；这就是文档保持真实的方式。
